Script.name: FKRPG_Init
Script.script:
-- Инициализация скриптов для Forest Kingdoms RPG -- Поддержка MSDP и GMCP протоколов
function fkrpg_init() -- Включение MSDP if msdp then sendMSDP("LIST") sendMSDP("REPORT", "HEALTH") sendMSDP("REPORT", "HEALTH_MAX") sendMSDP("REPORT", "MANA") sendMSDP("REPORT", "MANA_MAX") sendMSDP("REPORT", "LEVEL") sendMSDP("REPORT", "EXPERIENCE") sendMSDP("REPORT", "GOLD") end
-- Отправка GMCP Hello if gmcp then sendGMCP("Core.Hello", {client = "MUDlet", version = "1.0.0"}) end
echo("Forest Kingdoms RPG: Поддержка расширенных протоколов включена ") end
-- Регистрация функции инициализации registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysConnectionEvent", "fkrpg_init")
-- Обработчик MSDP данных function fkrpg_msdp_handler() if msdp["HEALTH"] and msdp["HEALTH_MAX"] then local health_percent = math.floor((msdp["HEALTH"] / msdp["HEALTH_MAX"]) * 100) echo("Здоровье: " .. msdp["HEALTH"] .. "/" .. msdp["HEALTH_MAX"] .. " (" .. health_percent .. "%) ") end
if msdp["MANA"] and msdp["MANA_MAX"] then local mana_percent = math.floor((msdp["MANA"] / msdp["MANA_MAX"]) * 100) echo("Мана: " .. msdp["MANA"] .. "/" .. msdp["MANA_MAX"] .. " (" .. mana_percent .. "%) ") end
if msdp["LEVEL"] then echo("Уровень: " .. msdp["LEVEL"] .. " ") end
if msdp["GOLD"] then echo("Золото: " .. msdp["GOLD"] .. " ") end end
-- Регистрация обработчика MSDP registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysMSDPUpdate", "fkrpg_msdp_handler")
-- Обработчик GMCP данных function fkrpg_gmcp_handler() if gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status then local status = gmcp.Char.Status if status.hp and status.maxhp then local hp_percent = math.floor((status.hp / status.maxhp) * 100) echo("HP: " .. status.hp .. "/" .. status.maxhp .. " (" .. hp_percent .. "%) ") end
if status.mp and status.maxmp then local mp_percent = math.floor((status.mp / status.maxmp) * 100) echo("MP: " .. status.mp .. "/" .. status.maxmp .. " (" .. mp_percent .. "%) ") end
if status.level then echo("Level: " .. status.level .. " ") end
if status.gold then echo("Gold: " .. status.gold .. " ") end end
if gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Info then local room = gmcp.Room.Info echo("Location: " .. room.name .. " (" .. room.area .. ") ") end end
-- Регистрация обработчика GMCP registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Status", "fkrpg_gmcp_handler") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.Info", "fkrpg_gmcp_handler")
